title: SEC seeks public comment as it weighs prediction market ETFs
summary: Bitwise, Roundhill Investments and GraniteShares had their prediction market ETF applications put on hold by the SEC earlier this month.

title: Hyperliquid ETFs surprise with 50% volume jump after slow launch
summary: ETF analyst Eric Balchunas says crypto and traditional assets are trading down while Hyperliquid is up, leading to a boon for ETFs tied to the token.

title: Indian Rupee Rises Most in Asia on Central Bank Intervention
summary: India’s rupee advanced the most in Asia after the central bank intervened and as policymakers are said to be considering options, including an interest-rate hike, to defend the currency.

title: Jamie Dimon on Bond Market, Inflation and Equities
summary: CEO of JPMorgan Chase Jamie Dimon speaks exclusively with Bloomberg's Haslinda Amin about the rout in bond markets, the risk of heightened inflation, and why corporate earnings remain so high. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bitcoin Firm Nakamoto Plots 1-for-40 Stock Split Following 99% Price Plunge
summary: Bitcoin treasury company Nakamoto aims to massively reduce its share count as it seeks a price of at least $1 to regain Nasdaq compliance.

title: Shai-Hulud: What to Know About the Malware Spreading Through Software Pipelines
summary: The Shai-Hulud supply-chain malware campaign is exploiting the automated systems developers trust to publish software safely.

title: SEC reviewing implications of delayed prediction market ETFs, Atkins says
summary: SEC Chair Paul Atkins said he instructed the agency's staff to seek public input on prediction market ETFs.

title: Hyperliquid ETFs attract record $25.5 million in net inflows as institutions pile in
summary: U.S. spot HYPE ETFs saw $25.5 million in net inflows on Wednesday, marking their largest positive flows since launch.

title: Elon Musk’s SpaceX sets out plans for biggest IPO in history
summary: AI and satellite company fires starting gun on wave of massive Wall Street listings
